locations_inspected.name: Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC - Primary Location
findings: Roof type is Shingle, 14 years old, rated Poor, with 0 years estimated remaining useful life
Water Heaters are Electric; Pipe Material is PVC
HVAC is Split System, 18 years old, condition needs service, maintenance program in place
Electrical service entrance is 400 Amp, panel condition Fair, no emergency/standby power, GFCI protection present
Automatic sprinkler system: Wet Pipe with N/A coverage
Sprinkler system last inspected 1 month ago and is NFPA 25 compliant
deficiencies: Building Envelope Integrity is Deteriorating and requires remediation
Roof rated Poor condition with 0 years of estimated remaining useful life - replacement needed
HVAC Split System (18 years old) needs service
Some fire extinguisher tags are expired - require immediate re-inspection and certification

recommendations.description: Address fire protection system deficiencies including expired fire extinguisher tags on units; ensure all 11 extinguishers are re-tagged and certified. Review wet pipe sprinkler coverage gaps noted as N/A.
Replace shingle roof immediately; rated Poor condition with 0 years of estimated remaining useful life after 14 years of service.
Repair and restore deteriorating building envelope integrity to prevent water intrusion and further structural degradation.
Remediate deteriorating waste/drain system; address fair-rated water supply infrastructure.
Service 18-year-old Split System HVAC; system condition is noted as needing service despite an active maintenance program.
Improve drainage and fencing/security systems currently rated Fair.

overall_assessment.summary: An on-site inspection was conducted at 9 locations for Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC. The survey assessed fire protection, building construction, occupancy hazards, and general risk management practices. Key concerns include a failed roof (0 years remaining useful life), deteriorating building envelope and waste/drain systems, an 18-year-old HVAC system needing service, and expired fire extinguisher tags. Total immediate capital expenditure needs across Plumbing, Roofing, and Fire Protection are estimated at $63,861, with short-term needs of $117,495 and reserves of $887,290 over years 3-12.
